query: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'orders' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2pckFt2u5CeuxLq.root --database BXW8YSRvB65k9jVkEnY35S --execute SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'orders' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
